title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 20
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a birthday present.
questions.audio_script: Man: Have you bought Mia's birthday present yet? || Boy: Not yet. I was going to get a necklace, but I do not know what style she likes. || Man: What about a candle? Mia likes those. || Boy: True, but I bought something similar last year. I saw a nice colourful backpack charm in town, and [1]I'll buy the colourful backpack charm[/1]. || Man: That sounds perfect. Do you want me to come with you? || Boy: Yes, please. I always choose better presents with help. || Boy: That should make things easier. || Boy: I did not want to decide at the last minute.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That sounds perfect. Do you want me to come with you?

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Yes, please. I always choose better presents with help.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: That should make things easier.

dialogue.speaker: boy

questions.context: You hear a visitor asking for directions inside a building.
questions.audio_script: Receptionist: Are you here for the new students' talk? || Visitor: Yes, but I don't know where to go. The email said it was in Room 12. || Receptionist: It was, but we had to move it because the projector stopped working. || Visitor: Is it in the theatre now? || Receptionist: No, that room is being cleaned. [1]The talk is in the sports hall beside the entrance[/1]. || Visitor: Thanks. Do I need to sign in first? || Receptionist: Yes, just write your name here, then follow the corridor to the end. || Receptionist: That should make things easier.

questions.context: You hear two people preparing for an event.
questions.audio_script: Man: Are you ready for the street party on Sunday? || Woman: Nearly. I was going to bring chairs, but the neighbours have plenty. || Man: We might need music speakers too. || Woman: Emma is bringing that, so don't worry. The organiser asked me this morning, and [1]I'm bringing the long tablecloths[/1]. || Man: Good. Is there space in your bag? || Woman: Yes, if I take out my big coat. The forecast says it will be warm. || Woman: That should make things easier. || Woman: I did not want to decide at the last minute. || Woman: We can talk about the rest later.

questions.context: You hear a coach talking to a player.
questions.audio_script: Coach: Are you joining the practice this evening? || Player: Yes, but I'm not sure what to bring. Last week we used yoga mats. || Coach: That was only because the hall was busy. Today we are outside again. || Player: Should I bring team shirts then? || Coach: No, the club has enough of those. [1]Bring your boxing gloves from home[/1]. || Player: OK. I'll pack them with my water bottle. || Coach: Good. And arrive ten minutes early so we can start on time. || Coach: That should make things easier. || Coach: I did not want to decide at the last minute.

questions.context: You hear two colleagues talking at work.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Why did the meeting start late this morning? || Man: I thought it was because the train was late, but that wasn't the main problem. || Woman: Was the lights broken again? || Man: No, it was working after someone restarted it. The real reason was that [1]the new security code did not work[/1]. || Woman: That explains it. Did anyone miss the first part? || Man: A few people did, so the manager is sending notes to everyone this afternoon. || Man: That should make things easier. || Man: I did not want to decide at the last minute.

questions.context: You hear a parent asking for help at home.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Could you help me before dinner? The house is a mess because your cousins are coming. || Man: Sure. Do you want me to vacuum the stairs? || Woman: I already did that this morning. || Man: Then I can wash the car. || Woman: Your dad is doing that outside. [1]Could you hang the wet clothes outside[/1], please. || Man: OK. I'll start now, but I need five minutes to finish this message first. || Woman: That's fine. Just do it before they arrive. || Woman: That should make things easier. || Woman: I did not want to decide at the last minute.

questions.context: You hear a teacher talking to a student.
questions.audio_script: Teacher: How is your art project going? || Student: Quite well. I found the information online and wrote the introduction last night. || Teacher: Have you added a list of materials? || Student: Not yet, but Sam is doing that part. I thought I had to make a poster too. || Teacher: No, not for this project. [1]You still need to take a photo of the finished painting[/1]. || Student: Great. I can do that after school. || Teacher: Remember to check the spelling before you send it to me tomorrow morning. || Teacher: That should make things easier.
